## Who

**Character name:**
**Source work:** <!-- Game / anime / manga / novel / other. Include studio/publisher if you know it. -->

## Why they fit

<!-- One or two sentences. Lutherverse's tone is cosmic horror + KH2 + FFX + Bloodborne + Dark Souls, with a running series of Easter-egg cameos (Sora, Bloodborne's Doll, Patches, O'aka, Tidus, plus light-touch nods to GTA/Warframe/Naruto/DBZ/Binding of Isaac). Where would yours land? -->

## Where they'd show up

<!-- Pick one or write your own: -->

- [ ] Town NPC (merchant, quest-giver, or wanderer met between floors)
- [ ] Boss floor cameo (they show up during or after a boss fight)
- [ ] Save-zone visitor (only encountered at rest zones)
- [ ] Item drop / weapon associated with them (e.g., their signature blade)
- [ ] Wandering encounter (rare, deep-floor)
- [ ] Other: <!-- describe -->

## Interaction idea

<!-- What does the player DO with them? Buy something? Fight them? Learn lore? Get haunted forever? -->

## Legal awareness

<!-- Lutherverse is a non-commercial GPLv3 fan project. Recognizable characters are handled as Easter eggs, not central content, and we don't accept cameos of real living people. If your suggestion is a real person, we'll close politely. If your suggestion is a trademarked character, we'll frame it carefully (and may use a placeholder name in public-facing text). -->

- [ ] Fictional character (not a real person)
- [ ] I'm aware this will be handled as a fan-project reference, not a licensed appearance
